title: I attract outstanding investment deals
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for shifting from scarcity around investment to expectation of good deals.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 47 of the MONEY program. For when the belief that the best investment opportunities are reserved for someone else is getting in the way.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 47 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 47 of the MONEY program. The lines work with the belief that property and investment success belongs to people who started earlier, have more contacts, or simply know something you don't.
I attract outstanding investment deals. The perfect opportunities come to me easily. I trust my judgment and build wealth with wise decisions.
Say it three times, slow, hand on heart. On the third pass, add a specific investment area you're working toward.
Adapted from Day 47 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
